demographics.living_situation: lives at home, bedbound, cared for by a primary caregiver

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: (Caregiver calling) There's constant liquid stool leaking out of her, the skin around her bottom is completely raw, and she cries out in pain every time we change the pads.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The leaking has been non-stop for the last day and the skin has gone raw and painful — I can't keep on top of the pad changes any more.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about three days ago when she was going to the toilet less and seemed uncomfortable in her belly
symptom_narrative.duration: about 72 hours in total; the constant leaking has been the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.character: at first she was opening her bowels less and seemed a bit bloated; now there is continuous leaking of watery, and sometimes more solid, stool that she can't control
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the caregiver says it is constant and she can't keep up with it; the patient is very distressed and cries during pad changes
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: around her bottom; the skin there is red raw
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant leaking through the day and the night
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing has really helped; frequent pad changes only keep the skin clean for a short while
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving or repositioning her is painful
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: her belly seems a bit bloated; no vomiting; she's been a bit off her food and drinking less
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: she has had trouble with constipation on and off
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: she is completely bedbound and relies on me for all her care; her memory and mobility problems mean she can't get to the toilet in time

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: ongoing pain that she takes strong painkillers for

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a regular strong pain medicine (an opioid)

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: bedbound older adult cared for at home by a primary caregiver who is becoming overwhelmed trying to manage the constant soiling

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home thermometer
single reading on an uncalibrated home device

objective_data_offered.value: the skin around her bottom is red and raw, sore to touch, and looks like it's spreading a little towards the buttock cheeks
continuous watery brown leakage soaking through the pads; a very high number of soiled pads today
her belly looks a bit bloated
she's been eating and drinking less than usual over the last couple of days
